prestazioni: Engine: AR32301 (2.0L Twin Spark 16V, 150 HP stock) – Full forged internals upgrade with JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and ACL Race Series bearings for 8,500 RPM reliability. Paired with a custom billet crankshaft from JE Motorsport (85mm stroke) to achieve 2.2L displacement.

Forced Induction: Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller. Supporting mods include a custom front-mount intercooler (GReddy Type-S, 600x300x76mm core) and a Bosch 044 fuel pump with ID1000x injectors for 350 HP on 98 RON fuel.

Suspension & Handling: Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV damping, 20mm adjustable ride height) with custom valving for the Spider’s 50:50 weight distribution. Front sway bar upgraded to Eibach Pro-Street (24mm solid) and rear sway bar to Hotchkis (18mm adjustable). Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (355mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 pads for fade-resistant braking.
estetica: Body Kit: Zender Classic 3-piece widebody kit (1980s homologation-spec, fiberglass construction) with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser from Prior Design. Painted in Alfa Rosso Competizione with matte black Zender side skirts and rear bumper lip.

Wheels & Tires: OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT 17x8 ET35 (front) and 17x9 ET38 (rear) in silver finish, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (225/45/17 front, 255/40/17 rear). Custom wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) from H&R for aggressive flush fitment.

Interior & Aero: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats (Alcantara/leather, FIA-approved) with Schroth 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage from Custom Cages (T45 steel, bolt-in design) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) and digital dash from AIM MXS Strada (1.3-inch display).
